name: scry guard
description: Requires a passing, single-use scry-sidecar__authorize_action call before any gated tool call goes through.

gatedTools.description: Tool names that require a passing scry-sidecar__authorize_action call, single-use, immediately before they run. Empty by default.

authMaxAgeSeconds.description: Staleness cap on an unconsumed authorize_action pass, in seconds. Single-use consumption is the real guard; this just bounds how long a never-used authorization can sit around.

robinhoodPlaceTools.description: Order-placing tool names (e.g. a connected agent.robinhood.com/mcp/trading server's place_equity_order) that get the STRICTER robinhood-guard-logic.ts gate instead of the plain gatedTools check: a matching prior robinhoodReviewTools call in this session, AND the live instruction spent on authorize_action must actually name this order's symbol/side. Empty by default.

robinhoodReviewTools.description: Order-preview tool names (e.g. review_equity_order) whose successful calls are recorded so a matching robinhoodPlaceTools call can require one first. A failed/errored review call is never recorded. Empty by default.
